pi_items.source: Verified by reading scripts/setup_data.sh which programmatically seeds the environment with this fictitious customer.
Verified by reading task.json instructions which mandate creating an account with this name, and export_result.sh which evaluates its creation.
Verified by reading task.json instructions and export_result.sh which validates the credit note amount.
Verified by reading task.json instructions which forbid using an Inventory Item, and export_result.sh which checks for proper allocation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates within a synthetic Manager.io instance seeded with fictitious Northwind Traders data. The target customer is 'Alfreds Futterkiste'. The user must create an account named 'Volume Discounts' and issue a credit note for 500.00 allocated to this account, without selecting any 'Inventory Item'.
